findings.headline: Cartier's Beverly Hills 로데오 드라이브 신축 플래그십, 2027년 오픈 목표로 진행 중
findings.summary: Cartier is building a new three-story, Foster + Partners-designed flagship at 370 N. Rodeo Drive in Beverly Hills, described as second in scale only to its New York flagship; the store is targeted to open between July and September 2027, not this year.
findings.why_it_matters: 리치몽 최대 자산 카르티에가 대형 리테일에 계속 베팅하고 있어, 구찌의 미국 서부 매장 재단장·플래그십 전략과 직접 비교 대상이 됨
findings.why_it_matters_en: Richemont's flagship jeweler continues large-format retail bets in the US, a direct benchmark for Gucci's own US West Coast flagship strategy.

findings.headline: Van Cleef & Arpels, 런던 해러즈에 몰입형 Perlée 팝업 체험관 오픈
findings.summary: Van Cleef & Arpels turned a space inside Harrods into an immersive Perlée-themed retail experience, following the collection's South of France relaunch event in early June 2026.
findings.why_it_matters: 리치몽 주얼리 하우스들이 컬렉션 리런치를 몰입형 백화점 팝업으로 증폭시키는 전략을 쓰고 있어, 구찌의 리테일 이벤트 기획에 참고할 벤치마크
findings.why_it_matters_en: Richemont jewelry houses are amplifying collection relaunches with immersive department-store pop-ups, a retail-activation benchmark for Gucci's own event planning.

findings.headline: Tiffany, 미키 매디슨 기용한 'Love & Celebration' 캠페인으로 자기애 메시지 확장
findings.summary: Tiffany & Co launched a Love & Celebration campaign fronted by Academy Award-winning actress Mikey Madison to introduce the new Sixteen Stone solitaire ring, reworking the classic petal-plucking motif into a self-love message ('I love me').
findings.why_it_matters: LVMH 티파니가 로맨스 중심 다이아몬드 마케팅을 자기애·커뮤니티로 확장한 것은 활성화 캠페인이지 여론 개선의 증거는 아니며, 구찌 주얼리 라인의 캠페인 메시징 다변화에 시사점을 줌 (이는 브랜드 자체 마케팅 활동에 대한 보도이며 여론 개선의 증거는 아님)
findings.why_it_matters_en: LVMH's Tiffany broadening diamond marketing from romance to self-love/community is brand-generated activation coverage, not evidence of sentiment shift, but signals a messaging trend relevant to Gucci jewelry campaign diversification.

findings.headline: Tiffany, 하이주얼리 'Blue Book 2026: Hidden Garden' 3단계 출시 시작
findings.summary: Tiffany unveiled the spring chapter of its 2026 Blue Book high jewelry collection, 'Hidden Garden,' a 122-piece line by chief artistic officer Nathalie Verdeille reinterpreting Jean Schlumberger's flora-and-fauna archive, with summer and fall chapters still to come.
findings.why_it_matters: 3단계 하이주얼리 롤아웃 전략은 뉴스 사이클을 연중 분산시키는 방식으로, 구찌 하이주얼리 라인 출시 캐던스 설계에 참고할 만함 (4월 발표건이나 배경 신호로 유지)
findings.why_it_matters_en: The phased spring/summer/fall high-jewelry rollout spreads news cycles across the year, a cadence model worth studying for Gucci's own high jewelry launches (April announcement, kept as background context).

findings.headline: Bulgari, 여름 시즌용 Bulgari Bulgari Aluminium 신모델 2종 공개
findings.summary: Bulgari added two new references to its Bulgari Bulgari Aluminium watch line for summer 2026, including a 500-piece limited edition with a deep blue sunray dial, both powered by the in-house B77 automatic caliber.
findings.why_it_matters: LVMH 산하 불가리가 액세서블 럭셔리 워치·주얼리 세그먼트를 계속 확장 중이며, 구찌의 워치/주얼리 크로스오버 전략과 가격대가 겹치는 경쟁 지점
findings.why_it_matters_en: LVMH's Bulgari keeps expanding the accessible-luxury watch/jewelry segment, overlapping in price tier with Gucci's own watch-jewelry crossover ambitions.

findings.headline: 리치몽, 카르티에·반클리프 주도로 주얼리 부문 두 자릿수 매출 성장 지속
findings.summary: Richemont's FY2026 results showed jewelry maisons Cartier, Van Cleef & Arpels, Buccellati and Vhernier posting a combined 14% sales increase to roughly $19.2 billion, again outperforming the group's fashion and leather-goods division.
findings.why_it_matters: 하이주얼리·파인워치 카테고리가 패션·가죽제품보다 견조한 성장을 보이는 구조적 흐름은, 구찌가 하드 럭셔리(주얼리) 확장을 검토할 근거가 되는 카테고리 트렌드
findings.why_it_matters_en: Hard-luxury jewelry outgrowing fashion/leather goods is a structural category trend that bolsters the case for Gucci's own hard-luxury (jewelry) expansion.

findings.headline: 카르티에, 신임 최고상업책임자(CCO)로 그레구아르 블랑슈 선임
findings.summary: Cartier appointed Grégoire Blanche as Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer effective January 1, 2026, based in Geneva and joining the maison's International Executive Committee, reporting to CEO Louis Ferla.
findings.source: French Chamber of Commerce Hong Kong (citing Cartier)
findings.why_it_matters: 루이 페를라 체제 하 카르티에가 상업 조직을 재정비 중임을 보여주는 배경 신호로, 리치몽 최대 캐시카우의 임원진 안정성을 계속 모니터링할 필요
findings.why_it_matters_en: Shows Cartier restructuring its commercial leadership under CEO Louis Ferla; background signal worth continued monitoring given Cartier's role as Richemont's biggest earnings driver.

findings.headline: 판도라, 랩그로운 다이아몬드 매출 1분기 15% 감소하며 성장세 둔화
findings.summary: Pandora's Q1 2026 lab-grown diamond revenue fell 15% year-over-year and remained just 1% of total sales, even as the company had previously targeted over $143 million in lab-grown diamond revenue by 2026, signaling the category's momentum is cooling amid falling wholesale prices.
findings.why_it_matters: 랩그로운 다이아몬드가 대중 주얼리에서도 성장 둔화 조짐을 보이는 것은, 하드 럭셔리 진출 시 소재 전략(천연 vs 합성)에 대한 카테고리 전반의 경고 신호
findings.why_it_matters_en: Cooling lab-grown diamond growth even at accessible-luxury Pandora is a category-wide caution signal on material strategy (natural vs synthetic) for any luxury house considering hard-luxury entry.
